SESSION.NAME: defaultSession
SESSION.DESCRIPTION: This diagnostic session enables the default diagnostic session in the server(s) and does not support any diagnostic application timeout handling provisions (e.g., TesterPresent service is not necessary to keep the session active). A server shall always start the default diagnostic session when powered up. If no other diagnostic session is started, then the default diagnostic session shall be running as long as the server is powered.

SESSION.NAME: programmingSession
SESSION.DESCRIPTION: This diagnosticSession enables all diagnostic services required to support the memory programming of a server. Regardless of whether the programmingSession runs in boot software or not, the ECU shall automatically suspend logging of DTCs and suspend transmission of non-diagnostic frames when entering the programmingSession.

SESSION.NAME: extendedDiagnosticSession
SESSION.DESCRIPTION: This diagnosticSession is used to enable timed diagnostic service functionality (e.g., I/O control). The diagnostic functionality in this session shall also include all supported diagnostic functionality supported in the defaultSession.

DATA_FORMAT_IDENTIFIER.NAME: No Compression Method and No Encryption Method

DTC_EXTENDED_DATA_RECORD.NAME: Operation cycle counter #2
DTC_EXTENDED_DATA_RECORD.DESCRIPTION: Number of operation cycles since the DTC fault detection counter last reached its maximum value of +127 (since DTC information was last cleared). The operation cycles during which the test was not completed shall be excluded

DTC_EXTENDED_DATA_RECORD.NAME: DTC Fault Detection Counter
DTC_EXTENDED_DATA_RECORD.DESCRIPTION: The purpose of this counter is to provide a mechanism for filtering the results of a low-level fault detection process so that test results (pass and fail) can be qualified before setting any DTC status bits.

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.TEST_RUN_CRITERIA: Key in Run, ACC, or Delayed Acc. Voltage is between 10 and 16 volts. ANC Microphone 1 is Enabled and ANC is Enabled.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: Pass: For AKM and PCM Codecs: 1. Microphone Input IS NOT shorted between the positive and negative microphone input for 1 to 3 seconds. 2. The microphone controller IS NOT reporting an Overcurrent or Overtemp condition for 1000ms. For PCM Codec Only: 1. The microphone controller IS NOT reporting a PLL Clock Error OR ASI Bus Clock Error condition for 1000ms. - Fail: For AKM and PCM Codecs: 1. Microphone Input IS shorted between the positive and negative microphone input for 8 to 12 seconds. 2. The microphone controller IS reporting an Overcurrent OR Overtemp condition on one or more microphones for 1000ms. For PCM Codec Only: 1. The microphone controller IS reporting a PLL Clock Error OR ASI Bus Clock Error condition for 1000ms.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FAULT_SYMPTOM: Loss of ANC functinality may be heard.

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: PASS: Speaker NOT open. FAIL: Speaker open. In startup diagnostics: For fail state, this DTC will be set only after 4 retries. If failed this will add a delay in the AHU initialization

OR AMP Communication Error In startup diagnostics: For fail state, this DTC will be set only after 4 retries. If failed this will add a delay in the AHU initialization

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.TEST_RUN_CRITERIA: Vbatt= 10-16V, Ign=RUN/ACC/Delayed ACC. If the Antenna config (DE00:B0) is set to $04:Active Single Antenna, SWB+ or $05:Active Diversity Antenna, SWB+ and Phantom 2, then SWB+ positive pin is monitored. If the Antenna config (DE00:B0) is set to $01:Active Single Antenna, Phantom 1 or $03:Active Diversity Antenna, Phantom 1 and 2, then the center conductor of the AM/FM1 Phantom Feed is active.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: Pass: Current <= 140ma Fail: Current >= 180ma continuously for two seconds
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FAULT_SYMPTOM: AMFM radio reception will be degraded.

DTC_FAILURE_INFO.ECU_CONNECTOR_PIN: If DE00:B0: $04:Active Single Antenna, SWB+ or $05:Active Diversity Antenna, SWB+ and Phantom 2$04 or $05, then J1-18 (SWB+ positive pin) is active If DE00:B0:$01:Active Single Antenna, Phantom 1 or $03:Active Diversity Antenna, Phantom 1 and 2, then the center conductor of the AM/FM1Phantom Feed is active

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.TEST_RUN_CRITERIA: Vbatt= 10-16V, Ign=RUN/ACC/Delayed ACC. If the Antenna config (DE00:B0) is set to $04:Active Single Antenna, SWB+ or $05:Active Diversity Antenna, SWB+ and Phantom 2, then SWB+ positive pin is monitored. If the Antenna config (DE00:B0) is set to $01:Active Single Antenna, Phantom 1 or $03:Active Diversity Antenna, Phantom 1 and 2, then the center conductor of the AM/FM1 Phantom Feed is active.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: Pass: Current >= 20ma for greater than one second Fail: Current < 20ma for greater than one second
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FAULT_SYMPTOM: AMFM radio reception will be degraded.

DTC_FAILURE_INFO.ECU_CONNECTOR_PIN: If DE00:B0: $04:Active Single Antenna, SWB+ or $05:Active Diversity Antenna, SWB+ and Phantom 2, then J1-18 (SWB+ positive pin) is active If DE00:B0:$01:Active Single Antenna, Phantom 1 or $03:Active Diversity Antenna, Phantom 1 and 2, then the center conductor of the AM/FM1Phantom Feed is active

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.TEST_RUN_CRITERIA: Vbatt= 10-16V, Ign=RUN/ACC/Delayed ACC. MS_ACM_SDARS only. DE00 configuration has Internal SDARS configured Available. - The Sync inits the SRM via DRDL (using the SXi protocol) . - The AHU then eavesdrops on DRDL Tx for a notification from the SRM to the Sync indicating that a fault exists (StatusInd message)
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.TEST_PERIOD: Run once during Startup and once the fault is reported or fixed.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: PASS: Current < 228mA FAIL: Current > 399mA are guaranteed to be reported as a short to ground.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FAULT_SYMPTOM: SDARS inoperable

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.TEST_RUN_CRITERIA: Vbatt= 10-16V, Ign=RUN/ACC/Delayed ACC. MS_ACM_SDARS only. DE00 configuration has Internal SDARS configured Available. - The Sync inits the SRM via DRDL (using the SXi protocol) . - The AHU then eavesdrops on DRDL Tx for a notification from the SRM to the Sync indicating that a fault exists (StatusInd message)
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.TEST_PERIOD: Run once during Startup and once the fault is reported or resolved.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: PASS: Current > 20mA FAIL: Current < 2mA are guaranteed to be reported as an open
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FAULT_SYMPTOM: SDARS inoperable

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.TEST_RUN_CRITERIA: Vbatt= 10-16V, Ign=RUN/ACC/Delayed ACC. Second Antenna = Enabled.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: Pass: Current <= 140ma for greater than one second Fail: Current > 140ma for greater than one second
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FAULT_SYMPTOM: AMFM radio reception will be degraded.

DTC_FAILURE_INFO.ECU_CONNECTOR_PIN: When Second Antenna = Enabled, Antenna 2 Phantom Feed power connector

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.TEST_RUN_CRITERIA: Vbatt= 10-16V, Ign=RUN/ACC/Delayed ACC. Second Antenna = Enabled.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: Pass: Current >= 20ma for greater than one second Fail: Current < 20ma for greater than one second
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FAULT_SYMPTOM: AMFM radio reception will be degraded.

DTC_FAILURE_INFO.ECU_CONNECTOR_PIN: When Second Antenna = Enabled, Antenna 2 Phantom Feed power connector

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.TEST_RUN_CRITERIA: 1.- The component must be between 10 volts and 16 volts 2.- The signal ignition_Status must equal RUN (last known) 3.- The signal PwPckTq_D_Stat must NOT be equal to PwPckStrtInPrgrss_TqNotAvail (last known) 4.- The signal ElPw_D_Stat (if supported) must NOT be equal to LV Event in Progress (last known) 5.- The signal Ignition_Status must not have changed in the last 1000 ms 6.- The signal PwPckTq_D_Stat must not have changed in the last 1000 ms 7.- The signal ElPw_D_Stat (if supported) must not have changed in the last 1000 ms 8.- The component must suspend missing message setting strategy when performing diagnostic routines 9.- The component mus be in non-programming modes 10.- The status message must be missing for more than five seconds in all of the above states listed above 11.- Timers shall be stored and controlled in the application software 12.- Timers need be continuously reset if they do not match items 1-7 above 13.- Reset time if message is received
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: ----For CGEA configuration (DE00:B16:b6: CGEA/FNV2) consider the following messages: --Pass: 0x167 AND 0x202 AND 0x3D0* AND 0x204* AND 0x20A* AND 0x27A* are NOT missing for more than 5 seconds --Fail: 0x167 OR 0x202 OR 0x3D0* OR 0x204* OR 0x20A* OR 0x27A* missing for > 5 seconds ................................................................................................................................................................................... ----Message(s): 0x3D0, 0x204, 0x20A: ---Preconditions: If (ESE = Configured and Activated**) ---Then TEST for the presence of 0x3D0, 0x204, 0x20A .................................................................................................................................................................................... ----Message(s): 0x27A ---Preconditions: If ((ESE = Configured and Activated** ) AND (DE00: B15:b2-3 [Auto Tow Haul OR EngExhMdeQuiet_D2_Stat] are/is configured as Available) AND (Drive Mode Selection == DMSL=1:Enabled)) ---Then TEST for the presence of 0x27A .................................................................................................................................................................................... - Message(s): 0x204: --- Preconditions: If (EVESE = Configured and Activated**) ---Then test for the presence of 0x204 .................................................................................................................................................................................... - Message(s): 0x204, 0x3D0, 0x27A: --- Preconditions: If each of the messages fullfil the conditions above ---Then test for the correspondingly Update bit being sent as Fresh at least once every 5 seconds. Refer to Special conditions for more details. =============================================================================================== ----For FNV3 configuration (DE00:B16:b6:FNV3) consider the following messages: --Pass: 0x167 AND 0x202 AND 0x92 AND 0x204* AND 0x14A* AND 0x44C* are NOT missing for more than 5 seconds --Fail: 0x167 OR 0x202 OR 0x92* OR 0x204* OR 0x14A* OR 0x44C* missing for > 5 seconds .................................................................................................................................................................................... ----Message(s): 0x92, 0x204 and 0x14A ---Preconditions: If (ESE = Configured and Activated**) ---Then TEST for the presence of 0x92, 0x204 and 0x14A. .................................................................................................................................................................................... ----Message(s): 0x44C ---Preconditions: If ((ESE = Configured and Activated**) AND (DE00: B15: b2-3 [Auto Tow Haul OR EngExhMdeQuiet_D2_Stat] are/is configured as Available.) AND (Drive Mode Selection == DMSL=1:Enabled)) ---Then TEST for the presence of 0x44C. .................................................................................................................................................................................... - Message(s): 0x204: --- Preconditions: If (EVESE = Configured and Activated**) ---Then test for the presence of 0x204 =============================================================================================== --Notes: (*) Asterisk indicates the presence of a precondition to be applied before that message is checked to be present on the bus. .................................................................................................................................................................................... (**) ANC ESE Activation Rules 1. The feature needs to be Configured as Enabled in the DE00 block before it can be Activated. 2. ANC/ESE/EVESE Activation is performed using Routine 3008. A Positive Response of Success is required for the feature to Be Activated. 3. Reading EE03 (ESE/EVESE) and/or EE05 (ANC) will indicate the status of Activation for these features. 4. If ANC is Configured as Enabled, ESE is Enabled by Default. ESE is always present when ANC is Enabled. .................................................................................................................................................................................... EVESE does NOT use DMSL. If the AHU is an Activated EVESE variant AND DMSL is enabled, the Misconfig DTC shall be set. -- EVESE and ESE/ANC features are mutually exclusive, refer to ANC ESE activation rules. .................................................................................................................................................................................... --- the Software ESE/EV-ESE configuration is set in DE00:B5:b4:Disabled/Enabled. --- the ESE Drive Mode Selection Logic (DMSL) is set in DE00:B15:b4:Use DE03/ Use DMSL to choose Drive Mode.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.ECU_FAULT_ACTION: if 0x167 is missing; radio will stop logging DTCs.; See Special Procedure "ANC/ESE and EV-ESEMissing Message Behavior" for ANC/ESE/EV-ESE behavior. if 0x204 OR 0x3D0 (CGEA) OR 0x20A (CGEA) OR 0x14A (FNV3) OR 0x92 (FNV3) is missing; See Special Procedure "ANC/ESE and EV-ESEMissing Message Behavior" for ANC/ESE/EV-ESE behavior. if 0x202 is missing; Vehicle Speed compensated volume will be set to 0 mph conditions (no audio adjustment); See Special Procedure "ANC/ESE and EV-ESEMissing Message Behavior" for ANC/ESE/EV-ESE behavior. if 0x27A (CGEA) OR 0x44C (FNV3) is missing; ESE Drive modes may not change, See Special Procedure "ANC/ESE/EV- ESE Drive Mode Selection" for ANC/ESE/EV-ESE behavior.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FAULT_SYMPTOM: 0x167: Radio will stop logging DTCs. 0x204 OR 0x3D0 (CGEA) OR 0x20A (CGEA) OR 0x14A (FNV3) OR 0x92 (FNV3) is missing, ESE or EV-ESE sound may be muted. 0x202 speed compensated volume at zero, ESE or EV-ESE sound may be muted. 0x27A (CGEA) OR 0x44C (FNV3) ESE or EV-ESE sound may be muted.

DTC_FAILURE_INFO.ECU_CONNECTOR_PIN: J1-19 CAN H, J1-30 CAN L

DTC.DESCRIPTION: Lost Communication With Anti-Lock Brake System (ABS) Control Module "A"

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.TEST_RUN_CRITERIA: 1.- The component must be between 10 volts and 16 volts 2.- The signal ignition_Status must equal RUN (last known) 3.- The signal PwPckTq_D_Stat must NOT be equal to PwPckStrtInPrgrss_TqNotAvail (last known) 4.- The signal ElPw_D_Stat (if supported) must NOT be equal to LV Event in Progress (last known) 5.- The signal Ignition_Status must not have changed in the last 1000 ms 6.- The signal PwPckTq_D_Stat must not have changed in the last 1000 ms 7.- The signal ElPw_D_Stat (if supported) must not have changed in the last 1000 ms 8.- The component must suspend missing message setting strategy when performing diagnostic routines 9.- The component mus be in non-programming modes 10.- The status message must be missing for more than five seconds in all of the above states listed above 11.- Timers shall be stored and controlled in the application software 12.- Timers need be continuously reset if they do not match items 1-7 above 13.- Reset time if message is received. 14.- ANC and/or ESE or EV- ESE feature(s) is/are ACTIVATED. 15.- DE00:B15:b6-5 is configured as 00 or 01 (ESE Drive Mode Selection Signal)
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: --- For ESE Drive Mode Selection Signal = 00 -- Pass: 0x420* NOT missing for more than 5 seconds. -- Fail: 0x420* is missing for more than five seconds. ---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- --- For ESE Drive Mode Selection Signal = 01 -- Pass: 0x413* NOT missing for more than 5 seconds. -- Fail: 0x413* is missing for more than five seconds. ---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- Message(s): 0x413: --- Preconditions: If (ESE OR EVESE = Configured and Activated**) ---Then test for the presence of 0x413 ................................................................................................................ Message(s): 0x420: --- Preconditions: If (ESE OR EVESE = Configured and Activated**) ---Then test for the presence of 0x420 ................................................................................................................. Note: When ANC is configured as Enabled, ESE is Enabled by default in the DE00 configuration.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.ECU_FAULT_ACTION: Msg below refers to either $413 or $420 with respect to the configuration. --- ESE: -- If Drive Mode Selection Logic is 0x00:DE03: -- If Msg is missing, ESE will Mute the output. -- If Drive Mode Selection Logic is 0x01:DMSL: -- If Msg is missing, ESE will Mute the output. -------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- --- EV-ESE: -- If Drive Mode Selection Logic is 0x00:DE03: -- If Msg is missing, -- ESE will Mute the output. -- Status will report Disabled. -- If Drive Mode Selection Logic is 0x00:DMSL: -- The feature shall already be Muted and Disabled with the DTC E10100 set as this is not a valid configuration for EV-ESE.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FAULT_SYMPTOM: ESE or EV-ESE output will be muted.

DTC_FAILURE_INFO.ECU_CONNECTOR_PIN: J1-9 CAN H, J1-30 CAN L

DTC.DESCRIPTION: Lost Communication With Body Control Module

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.TEST_RUN_CRITERIA: 1.- The component must be between 10 volts and 16 volts 2.- The signal ignition_Status must equal RUN (last known) 3.- The signal PwPckTq_D_Stat must NOT be equal to PwPckStrtInPrgrss_TqNotAvail (last known) 4.- The signal ElPw_D_Stat (if supported) must NOT be equal to LV Event in Progress (last known) 5.- The signal Ignition_Status must not have changed in the last 1000 ms 6.- The signal PwPckTq_D_Stat must not have changed in the last 1000 ms 7.- The signal ElPw_D_Stat (if supported) must not have changed in the last 1000 ms 8.- The component must suspend missing message setting strategy when performing diagnostic routines 9.- The component mus be in non-programming modes 10.- The status message must be missing for more than five seconds in all of the above states listed above 11.- Timers shall be stored and controlled in the application software 12.- Timers need be continuously reset if they do not match items 1-7 above 13.- Reset time if message is received
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: Pass: 0x3B2 NOT missing for more than 5 seconds Fail: 0x3B2 is missing for more than five seconds.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FAULT_SYMPTOM: ANC system fades itself out, ESE system is not affected.

DTC_FAILURE_INFO.ECU_CONNECTOR_PIN: J1-9 CAN H, J1-30 CAN L

DTC.DESCRIPTION: Lost Communication With Body Control Module "B"

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.TEST_RUN_CRITERIA: 1.- The component must be between 10 volts and 16 volts 2.- The signal ignition_Status must equal RUN (last known) 3.- The signal PwPckTq_D_Stat must NOT be equal to PwPckStrtInPrgrss_TqNotAvail (last known) 4.- The signal ElPw_D_Stat (if supported) must NOT be equal to LV Event in Progress (last known) 5.- The signal Ignition_Status must not have changed in the last 1000 ms 6.- The signal PwPckTq_D_Stat must not have changed in the last 1000 ms 7.- The signal ElPw_D_Stat (if supported) must not have changed in the last 1000 ms 8.- The component must suspend missing message setting strategy when performing diagnostic routines 9.- The component mus be in non-programming modes 10.- The status message must be missing for more than five seconds in all of the above states listed above 11.- Timers shall be stored and controlled in the application software 12.- Timers need be continuously reset if they do not match items 1-7 above 13.- Reset time if message is received.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: ---- For CGEA configuration (DE00:B16b6: CGEA/FNV2) consider the following messages: --Pass: 0x277* are NOT missing for more than 5 seconds --Fail: 0x277* missing for > 5 seconds .................................................................................................................................................................................... 1.----Message(s): 0x277 (window signals) ---Preconditions: If (Convertible == (Convertible Present OR Convertible NOT Present) AND (ANC == Configured and Activated**)) ---Then TEST for the presence of 0x277. (ANC needs window status) .................................................................................................................................................................................... 2.----Message(s): 0x277 (Convertible signals) ---Preconditions: If (Convertible == Convertible Present AND (ESE = Configured and Activated**) AND (Drive Mode Selection Logic == 0x01:DMSL)) ---Then TEST for the presence of 0x277. (ESE DMSL uses Convertible Signals for Drive Mode Selection) (If ESE is Activated, uses default from DBC or current values from bus if present) .................................................................................................................................................................................... 3.----Message(s): 0x277 (Convertible signals) ---Preconditions: If (Convertible == Convertible NOT Present AND (ESE == Configured and Activated**) AND (Drive Mode Selection Logic == 0x01:DMSL)) ---Then DO NOT test for the presence of 0x277. (If ESE is Activated, uses default from DBC or current values from bus if present) .................................................................................................................................................................................... 4.----Message(s): 0x277 (Window and Convertible signals) ---Preconditions: If (Convertible == (Convertible Present OR Convertible NOT Present) AND (EVESE ***== Configured and Activated**)) ---Then DO NOT test for the presence of 0x277. (EVESE DOES NOT use the Window or Convertible signals for anything) ============================================================================================ ---For FNV3 configuration (DE00:B16:b6:FNV3) consider the following messages: --Pass: 0x3D1* AND 0x33F* AND 0x33C* are NOT missing for more than 5 seconds --Fail: 0x3D1* OR 0x33F* OR 0x33C* are missing for more than five seconds .................................................................................................................................................................................... 1.----Message(s): 0x33C OR 0x33F (Window Status) ---Preconditions: If (Convertible == (Convertible Present OR Convertible NOT Present) AND (ANC == Configured and Activated**)) ---Then TEST for the presence of 0x33C AND 0x33F .................................................................................................................................................................................... 2.----Message(s): 0x3D1 (Convertible signals) ---Preconditions: If (Convertible == Convertible Present AND (ESE = Configured and Activated**) AND (Drive Mode Selection Logic == 0x01:DMSL)) ---Then TEST for the presence of 0x3D1. (ESE DMSL uses Convertible Signals for Drive Mode Selection) (If ESE is Activated, uses default from DBC or current values from bus if present) .................................................................................................................................................................................... 3.----Message(s): 0x3D1 (Convertible signals) ---Preconditions: If (Convertible == Convertible NOT Present AND (ESE == Configured and Activated**) AND (Drive Mode Selection Logic == 0x01:DMSL)) ---Then DO NOT test for the presence of 0x3D1. (If ESE is Activated, uses default from DBC or current values from bus if present) .................................................................................................................................................................................... 4.----Message(s): 0x33C OR 0x33F OR 0x3D1 (window and convertible signals) ---Preconditions: If (Convertible == (Convertible Present or Convertible Not Present) AND (EVESE*** == Configured and Activated**)) ---Then DO NOT TEST for the presence of 0x33C OR 0x33F OR 0x3D1. (EVESE DOES NOT use the Window or Convertible signal for anything) ============================================================================================ --Notes: (*) Asterisk indicates the presence of a precondition to be applied before that message is checked to be present on the bus. .................................................................................................................................................................................... (**) ANC ESE Activation Rules 1. The feature needs to be Configured as Enabled in the DE00 block before it can be Activated. 2. ANC/ESE/EVESE Activation is performed using Routine 3008. A Positive Response of Success is required for the feature to Be Activated. 3. Reading EE03 (ESE/EVESE) and/or EE05 (ANC) will indicate the status of Activation for these features. 4. If ANC is Configured as Enabled, ESE is Enabled by Default. ESE is always present when ANC is Enabled. .................................................................................................................................................................................... (***) EVESE does NOT use DMSL. If the AHU is an Activated EVESE variant AND DMSL is enabled, the Misconfig DTC shall be set. -- EVESE and ANC/ESE features are mutually exclusive. .................................................................................................................................................................................... -- With the implementation of DCR 368, the convertible status is now used for ANC top up/down status and for ESE Drive mode selection when DMSL is the selection method. -- If ANC is Activated, it will be set to fully closed .................................................................................................................................................................................... --The Convertible configuration is set in DE00:B6:b5:Non-Convertible/Convertible. --The Software ESE/EV-ESE configuration is set in DE00:B5:b4:Disabled/Enabled. --The Software ANC configuration is set in DE00:B5:b5:Disabled/Enabled. --ESE Drive Mode selection logic (DMSL) configuration is set in DE00:B15:b4: Use DE03 to choose drive mode/ Use DMSL to choose drive mode
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.ECU_FAULT_ACTION: 1.--- ANC is muted. 2.--- ESE: - the AHU shall use the default values from DBC or current values from bus if present, ESE may still be heard until DTC is set, then mute. 3.--- ESE: - the AHU shall use the convertible default values from DBC or current values from bus if present, ESE may still be heard depending on the DMSL configuration for Convertible. This is defined by the NVH tuner. 4.--- No effect on EVESE.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FAULT_SYMPTOM: 1.--- ANC is muted. 2. ---ESE: - the AHU shall use the default values from DBC or current values from bus if present, ESE may still be heard until DTC is set, then mute. 3. ---ESE: - the AHU shall use the convertible default values from DBC or current values from bus if present, ESE may still be heard depending on the DMSL configuration for Convertible. This is defined by the NVH tuner. 4.--- No effect on EVESE

DTC_FAILURE_INFO.ECU_CONNECTOR_PIN: J1-9 CAN H, J1-30 CAN L

DTC.DESCRIPTION: Lost Communication With Instrument Panel Cluster (IPC) Control Module

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.TEST_RUN_CRITERIA: 1.- The component must be between 10 volts and 16 volts 2.- The signal ignition_Status must equal RUN (last known) 3.- The signal PwPckTq_D_Stat must NOT be equal to PwPckStrtInPrgrss_TqNotAvail (last known) 4.- The signal ElPw_D_Stat (if supported) must NOT be equal to LV Event in Progress (last known) 5.- The signal Ignition_Status must not have changed in the last 1000 ms 6.- The signal PwPckTq_D_Stat must not have changed in the last 1000 ms 7.- The signal ElPw_D_Stat (if supported) must not have changed in the last 1000 ms 8.- The component must suspend missing message setting strategy when performing diagnostic routines 9.- The component mus be in non-programming modes 10.- The status message must be missing for more than five seconds in all of the above states listed above 11.- Timers shall be stored and controlled in the application software 12.- Timers need be continuously reset if they do not match items 1-7 above 13.- Reset time if message is received
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: Pass: 0x220, 0x225, 0x2F4 NOT missing for more than 5 seconds Fail: Missing 0x220, 0x225, and 0x2F4 for more than five seconds. (When Chime Strategy = 0 [North American Chimes])
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.ECU_FAULT_ACTION: 0x220, 0x225, 0x2F4 - Loss of chimes through radio. If a Chime is currently playing when the fault condition is set, the Chime will be stopped immediately. Subsequent requests to play chimes while the fault is present shall be returned with "Chime Not Recognized
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FAULT_SYMPTOM: 0x220, 0x225, 0x2F4 - Loss of chimes through radio. If a Chime is currently playing when the fault condition is set, the Chime will be stopped immediately. Subsequent requests to play chimes while the fault is present shall be returned with "Chime Not Recognized

DTC_FAILURE_INFO.ECU_CONNECTOR_PIN: J1-9 CAN H, J1-30 CAN L

DTC.DESCRIPTION: Lost Communication With Telematic Control Module "A"

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.TEST_RUN_CRITERIA: 1.- The component must be between 10 volts and 16 volts 2.- The signal ignition_Status must equal RUN (last known) 3.- The signal PwPckTq_D_Stat must NOT be equal to PwPckStrtInPrgrss_TqNotAvail (last known) 4.- The signal ElPw_D_Stat (if supported) must NOT be equal to LV Event in Progress (last known) 5.- The signal Ignition_Status must not have changed in the last 1000 ms 6.- The signal PwPckTq_D_Stat must not have changed in the last 1000 ms 7.- The signal ElPw_D_Stat (if supported) must not have changed in the last 1000 ms 8.- The component must suspend missing message setting strategy when performing diagnostic routines 9.- The component mus be in non-programming modes 10.- The status message must be missing for more than five seconds in all of the above states listed above 11.- Timers shall be stored and controlled in the application software 12.- Timers need be continuously reset if they do not match items 1-7 above 13.- Reset time if message is received 14.- DE00 Configuration, CANdbc must be set for CGEA (DE00:b16b:6:CGEA).
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: Pass: 0x27E NOT missing for more than 5 seconds Fail: Missing 0x27E for more than five seconds. (When TCU Chime Monitoring = Enabled.)
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FAULT_SYMPTOM: Chimes are played from Cluster, TCU may be inactive.

DTC_FAILURE_INFO.ECU_CONNECTOR_PIN: J1-9 CAN H, J1-30 CAN L

DTC.DESCRIPTION: Lost Communication With Digital Audio Control Module "D"

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.TEST_RUN_CRITERIA: 1.- The component must be between 10 volts and 16 volts 2.- The signal ignition_Status must equal RUN (last known) 3.- The signal PwPckTq_D_Stat must NOT be equal to PwPckStrtInPrgrss_TqNotAvail (last known) 4.- The signal ElPw_D_Stat (if supported) must NOT be equal to LV Event in Progress (last known) 5.- The signal Ignition_Status must not have changed in the last 1000 ms 6.- The signal PwPckTq_D_Stat must not have changed in the last 1000 ms 7.- The signal ElPw_D_Stat (if supported) must not have changed in the last 1000 ms 8.- The component must suspend missing message setting strategy when performing diagnostic routines 9.- The component mus be in non-programming modes 10.- The status message must be missing for more than five seconds in all of the above states listed above 11.- Timers shall be stored and controlled in the application software 12.- Timers need be continuously reset if they do not match items 1-7 above 13.- Reset time if message is received 14.- A2B DSP = Present
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: Pass: 0x224 NOT missing for more than 5 seconds Fail: 0x224 is missing for more than five seconds.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.ECU_FAULT_ACTION: DSP Alerts are inactive. AHU reports Chimes Not Supported.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FAULT_SYMPTOM: Alerts are not heard through the DSP. Audio may not be heard.

DTC_FAILURE_INFO.ECU_CONNECTOR_PIN: J1-9 CAN H, J1-30 CAN L

DTC.DESCRIPTION: Lost Communication With Accessory Protocol Interface Module

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.TEST_RUN_CRITERIA: 1.- The component must be between 10 volts and 16 volts 2.- The signal ignition_Status must equal RUN (last known) 3.- The signal PwPckTq_D_Stat must NOT be equal to PwPckStrtInPrgrss_TqNotAvail (last known) 4.- The signal ElPw_D_Stat (if supported) must NOT be equal to LV Event in Progress (last known) 5.- The signal Ignition_Status must not have changed in the last 1000 ms 6.- The signal PwPckTq_D_Stat must not have changed in the last 1000 ms 7.- The signal ElPw_D_Stat (if supported) must not have changed in the last 1000 ms 8.- The component must suspend missing message setting strategy when performing diagnostic routines 9.- The component mus be in non-programming modes 10.- The status message must be missing for more than five seconds in all of the above states listed above 11.- Timers shall be stored and controlled in the application software 12.- Timers need be continuously reset if they do not match items 1-7 above 13.- Reset time if message is received
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: Pass: 0x222 and 0x229 and 0x2E3 are NOT missing for more than 5 seconds Fail: 0x229 is missing for more than five seconds Fail: 0x2E3 is missing for more than five seconds Fail: 0x222 is missing for more than five seconds. (When APIM = 1 [Available] and APIM Type = 0 [Gen2])
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.ECU_FAULT_ACTION: if 0x222 is missing Loss of Sync Alerts, See Special Procedure "ANC/ESE and EV-ESEMissing Message Behavior" for ANC/ESE/EV-ESE behavior. if 0x229 is missing Loss of Bezel Diagnostics if 0x2E3 is missing Radio will shut off
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FAULT_SYMPTOM: 0x222 - Loss of Sync Alerts (when configured for APIM Gen2), EV-ESE will mute. 0x229 - Loss of functionality 0x2E3 - Radio will shut off

DTC_FAILURE_INFO.ECU_CONNECTOR_PIN: J1-9 CAN H, J1-30 CAN L

DTC.DESCRIPTION: Lost Communication With Front Controls Interface Module "A"

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.TEST_RUN_CRITERIA: 1.- The component must be between 10 volts and 16 volts 2.- The signal ignition_Status must equal RUN (last known) 3.- The signal PwPckTq_D_Stat must NOT be equal to PwPckStrtInPrgrss_TqNotAvail (last known) 4.- The signal ElPw_D_Stat (if supported) must NOT be equal to LV Event in Progress (last known) 5.- The signal Ignition_Status must not have changed in the last 1000 ms 6.- The signal PwPckTq_D_Stat must not have changed in the last 1000 ms 7.- The signal ElPw_D_Stat (if supported) must not have changed in the last 1000 ms 8.- The component must suspend missing message setting strategy when performing diagnostic routines 9.- The component mus be in non-programming modes 10.- The status message must be missing for more than five seconds in all of the above states listed above 11.- Timers shall be stored and controlled in the application software 12.- Timers need be continuously reset if they do not match items 1-7 above 13.- Reset time if message is received 14.- EFP = 0x00, CAN based
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: Pass: 0x2A0 NOT missing for more than 5 seconds. Fail: 0x2A0 is missing for more than five seconds.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.ECU_FAULT_ACTION: ECU stays at the current volume
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FAULT_SYMPTOM: Loss of button presses from CAN based button pack (EFP/FCIM)

DTC_FAILURE_INFO.ECU_CONNECTOR_PIN: J1-9 CAN H, J1-30 CAN L

DTC.DESCRIPTION: Lost Communication with Hybrid/EV Powertrain Control Module "A"

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.TEST_RUN_CRITERIA: 1.- The component must be between 10 volts and 16 volts 2.- The signal ignition_Status must equal RUN (last known) 3.- The signal PwPckTq_D_Stat must NOT be equal to PwPckStrtInPrgrss_TqNotAvail (last known) 4.- The signal ElPw_D_Stat (if supported) must NOT be equal to LV Event in Progress (last known) 5.- The signal Ignition_Status must not have changed in the last 1000 ms 6.- The signal PwPckTq_D_Stat must not have changed in the last 1000 ms 7.- The signal ElPw_D_Stat (if supported) must not have changed in the last 1000 ms 8.- The component must suspend missing message setting strategy when performing diagnostic routines 9.- The component mus be in non-programming modes 10.- The status message must be missing for more than five seconds in all of the above states listed above 11.- Timers shall be stored and controlled in the application software 12.- Timers need be continuously reset if they do not match items 1-7 above 13.- Reset time if message is received 14.- Must be an EV-ESE AHU 15.- EV-ESE is Enabled and Successfully Activated 16.- Dependant on DE00:B16:b7 - EV-ESE Torque Signal configuration. See Pass Fail criteria.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: If DE00:B16:b7 - EV-ESE Torque Signal = 0x00 (Legacy) Pass: 0x365 NOT missing for more than 5 seconds. Fail: 0x365 is missing for more than five seconds. - If DE00:B16:b7 - EV-ESE Torque Signal = 0x01 (New) Pass: 0x410 NOT missing for more than 5 seconds. Fail: 0x410 is missing for more than five seconds.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.ECU_FAULT_ACTION: The EV-ESE feature audio will fade out. See Special Procedure "ANC/ESE and EV-ESEMissing Message Behavior" for ANC/ESE/EV-ESE behavior.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FAULT_SYMPTOM: EV Engine Sound Enhancement (EV-ESE) will be muted.

DTC_FAILURE_INFO.ECU_CONNECTOR_PIN: J1-9 CAN H, J1-30 CAN L

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.TEST_RUN_CRITERIA: Vbatt= 10-16V, Ign=RUN/ACC/Delayed ACC. If Flat is set, DTC check is NOT performed (DE00 Byte 7 is equal to 0x00, Flat) OR If A2B AND A2B DSP = Enabled , DTC check is NOT performed.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: PASS: EQ file is NOT missing or corrupted (Checksum). FAIL: EQ file is missing or corrupted (Checksum).
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FAULT_SYMPTOM: Flat EQ

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.TEST_RUN_CRITERIA: Vbatt= 10-16V, Ign=RUN/ACC/Delayed ACC. Primary Enable Condition: This DTC is only available if: CAL entry: "D3 SPI Flash size:" is greater than 0x00. This indicates HiFi2 core external SPI Flash memory is present and loaded with HiFi2 core FW whose version can be checked by calling F123. This CAL entry is required for ANC/ESE, EV and Wave Chimes features to function. For ESE Only Variants: A second CAL entry is required as an Enable Condition to set this DTC for ANC/ESE failures: CAL Entry: Electric Vehicle Variant is equal to 0x00. See Failure Descriptions 1, 4 and 5. For ANC/ESE Variants: A second CAL entry is required as an Enable Condition to set this DTC for ANC/ESE failures: CAL Entry: Electric Vehicle Variant is equal to 0x00. CAL Entry: Mic Codec is equal to 0x01. See Failure Descriptions 1, 4 and 5. For EV-ESE Variants: A second CAL entry is required as an Enable Condition to set this DTC for EV-ESE failures: CAL Entry: Electric Vehicle Variant is equal to 0x01. See Failure Descriptions 2, 4 and 5. For Wave Chimes: A second CAL entry is required as an Enable Condition to set this DTC for Wave Chimes failures: CAL Entry: Secondary SPI flash:" is greater than 0x00. This secondary Flash CAL entry is where the actual Wave Chimes are located. See failure Descriptions 3. HiFi2 FW Check: See Failure Descriptions 4. Configuration Enable Conditions in DE00: None, only CAL entries used to indicate that this hardware supports Wave Chimes. Note: 1. For Electric Vehicle, the ESE configuration parameter shall be overloaded to also mean the EV version of ESE when the CAL flag for EV is Present.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: Each Pass and Fail reason is dependent on the Enable conditions and type of failure: PASS: -- The MBBM component is returning responses indicating successful functioning in status messages monitored internally. AND -- Wave Chimes are available. FAIL: -- The MBBM component has returned a response that indicates there is an error condition present in the component. AND / OR -- A Wave Chimes fault has been detected. Note: The Failure modes could indicate one or both features failing.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.ECU_FAULT_ACTION: ESE and/orANC functionality may be disabled. ESE-EV functionality may be disabled. Wave Chimes fucntionality may be disabled, AHU could report Chimes Not Supported. The type of fault that is currently present will predict what features are available.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FAULT_SYMPTOM: ESE and/orANC will not be heard. ESE-EV will not be heard. Chimes are played through Cluster

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.TEST_RUN_CRITERIA: Vbatt= 10-16V, Ign=RUN/ACC/Delayed ACC. AHU contains HiFI2 (D3 option 0x2 - 7754 or 0x03 - 7755) per CAL file. AHU contains Secondary SPI Flash (external 16Mbyte flash plus glue logic) as present in the CAL file.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.TEST_PERIOD: Continuous The check routine is run once at startup
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: PASS: Wave Chimes are present and valid FAIL: Wave Chimes are either not present or corrupted
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FAULT_SYMPTOM: AHU responds with Chime Not Recognized, Cluster will play the chime.

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.TEST_RUN_CRITERIA: Common Test Run Criteria
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: PASS: Module calibration configuration files configured/written with no errors. FAIL: Calibration files not written or calibration config data write generated error(s)
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.ECU_FAULT_ACTION: Some hardware may not be initialized
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FAULT_SYMPTOM: Some features may be missing.

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.TEST_RUN_CRITERIA: Vbatt= 10-16V, Ign=RUN/ACC/Delayed ACC. For ANC/ESE Variant: CAL Entry: "D3 SPI Flash size:" is greater than 0x00. CAL Entry: Electric Vehicle is set to 0x00 Configuration Enable Conditions in DE00: 1. ESE is Enabled and Activated. 2. Both ESE and ANC are Enabled and Activated. (ESE is Enabled by default when ANC is Enabled) For Electric Vehicle (EV-ESE) Variant: CAL Entry: "D3 SPI Flash size:" is greater than 0x00. CAL Entry: Electric Vehicle is set to 0x01 Configuration Enable Conditions in DE00: EV is Enabled and Activated.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: PASS: ESE/ ANC or EV Acoustic Profile is NOT missing or corrupted (Checksum). FAIL: ESE/ ANC or EV Acoustic Profile is missing or corrupted (Checksum).
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.ECU_FAULT_ACTION: ANC/ESE or EV-ESE Functionality will be disabled
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FAULT_SYMPTOM: ANC/ESE or EV-ESE is not heard

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.TEST_RUN_CRITERIA: Vbatt= 10-16V, Ign=RUN/ACC/Delayed ACC. Both of the following operations need to be successfully completed to enable checking of this DTC. 1. ESE, ANC/ESE or EV-ESE is Configured as Present in DE00, ANC, ESE and/or EV-ESE. 2. Feature is successfully Activated using DIDS EE03 (ESE / EV-ESE), EE05 (ANC Only) or Routine 3008 (Either or Both ANC/ESE or EV-ESE features). For ANC/ESE Variant: CAL Entry: Electric Vehicle is set to 0x00 For Electric Vehicle (EV-ESE) Variant: CAL Entry: Electric Vehicle is set to 0x01
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: PASS: 1. The Hardware version in the Profile matches the AHU Hardware Version. FAIL: 1. Hardware version is different.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.ECU_FAULT_ACTION: ESE, ANC and/or EV-ESE functionality will be disabled.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FAULT_SYMPTOM: ESE, ANC and/or EV-ESE will not be heard.

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.TEST_RUN_CRITERIA: Vbatt= 10-16V, Ign=RUN/ACC/Delayed ACC.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: PASS: Dirana 3 calibration is NOT missing or corrupted, internal sw revisions from D3 match what the AHU expects. FAIL: Dirana 3 calibration is missing or corrupted, internal sw revisions from D3 DO NOT match what the AHU expects.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.ECU_FAULT_ACTION: ECU may be muted or other features may not be available.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FAULT_SYMPTOM: Audio may be muted or other features may not be available.

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.TEST_RUN_CRITERIA: TBD - required for continuous DTCs
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: Pass: Production bootloader loaded and all binaries are Production signed. Fail: Development bootloader loaded AND/OR Development/Unsigned binary has been flashed.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.ECU_FAULT_ACTION: DTC is set, Application still functions.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FAULT_SYMPTOM: DTC will show up if the module is polled for DTC's.

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.TEST_RUN_CRITERIA: Vbatt= 10-16V, Ign=RUN/ACC/Delayed ACC.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: PASS: ACM has received initial configuration for Blocks DE00 & DE03. FAIL: ACM has NOT received initial configuration for Blocks DE00 & DE03.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FAULT_SYMPTOM: ACM may not operate as expected.

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.TEST_RUN_CRITERIA: Vbatt= 10-16V, Ign=RUN/ACC/Delayed ACC.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: PASS: No illegal or missing configurations. FAIL: Illegal or missing configurations.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.ECU_FAULT_ACTION: Configuration to result to functionality as described in each misconfiguration case.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FAULT_SYMPTOM: ACM may not perform as expected.

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.TEST_RUN_CRITERIA: Vbatt= 10-16V, Ign=RUN/ACC/Delayed ACC.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.TEST_PERIOD: Flash Checksum and EEPROM once during startup, On Demand Self Test
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: Pass: Flash - Checksum matches stored value at Battery Connect, Waking or On-Demand Self-Test EEPROM - Non-changing EEPROM checksum matches stored value at Battery Connect, Waking or On-Demand Self-Test. This includes the External EEPROM. Fail: Flash - Checksum error at Battery Connect, Waking or On-Demand Self-Test EEPROM - Checksum error at Battery Connect, Waking or On-Demand Self-Test. This includes the External EEPROM.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.ECU_FAULT_ACTION: Flash ROM checksum failure - Radio will cease to function normally EEPROM checksum failure - EEPROM portion cannot be used
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FAULT_SYMPTOM: Various Symptoms - Customer may never see any symptoms

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.TEST_RUN_CRITERIA: Vbatt= 10-16V, Ign=RUN/ACC/Delayed ACC.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.TEST_PERIOD: Whenever the AHU writes data to the EEPROM
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: EEPROM Write to Certain Sector Fails three times in a row
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.ECU_FAULT_ACTION: EEPROM portion is flagged for non-use
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FAULT_SYMPTOM: Various - User may never see problem.

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.TEST_RUN_CRITERIA: Vbatt= 10-16V, Ign=RUN/ACC/Delayed ACC. ANC is Enabled in DE00. ANC has already been successfully activated using $3008 or $EE05.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.TEST_PERIOD: When the routine $6035 Active Noise Cancellation (ANC) Active Diagnostic Test is run and the test fails.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: Pass: All parameters are within limits tested by the 6035 routine. Fail: One or more of the parameters tested by the 6035 routine are out of tolerance.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.ECU_FAULT_ACTION: ANC will mute and fade out
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FAULT_SYMPTOM: ANC is Disabled

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.TEST_RUN_CRITERIA: Vbatt= 10-16V, Ign=RUN/ACC/Delayed ACC. ANC is Enabled in DE00. ANC has already been successfully activated using $3008 or $EE05. (In order to successfully activate ANC, the follwoing CAL Entry needs to be true: Electric Vehicle Variant is equal to 0x00.)
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.TEST_PERIOD: Anytime that ANC is successfully running in the HiFi2 core.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: During normal operation, the MBBM component will be monitoring the output level. If Hard Clipping is detected, this DTC shall be set.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.ECU_FAULT_ACTION: ANC feature disabled, ESE also possible
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FAULT_SYMPTOM: Loss of ANC functinality will be heard. Loss of ESE functionality may be heard

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.TEST_RUN_CRITERIA: Normal Operating Mode, Voltage 10-16 Volts. The condition must occur for at least 30 seconds before starting the ODST.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: PASS: -Internal HD chip communication exists. (If HD Radio is configured ON) AND -Internal DAB chip communication exists (If DAB Radio is configured ON) AND -Internal TPEG chip communication exists (If TPEG hardware present) FAIL: -Internal HD chip does not communicate for 30 seconds. (If HD Radio is configured ON) OR -Internal DAB module failure, does not communicate (If DAB Radio is configured ON) OR -Internal TPEG module failure, does not communicate (If TPEG hardware present)
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.ECU_FAULT_ACTION: HD Operations are turned off (if HD failure) DAB Operation are turned off (if DAB failure) TPEG features are not active (if TPEG Failure)
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FAULT_SYMPTOM: HD radio will not work (if HD failure) DAB radio will not work (if DAB failure) TPEG features are not active (if TPEG Failure)

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.TEST_RUN_CRITERIA: If Monitoring Cycle requirements are met the check is performed.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: Continuous DTC: PASS: B+ is NOT less than 10V +/-7% for greater than 250 msec. FAIL: B+ is less than 10V +/-7% for greater than 10 seconds. On Demand Self Test: PASS: B+ is NOT less than 10V +/-7% for greater than 250 msec. FAIL: B+ is less than 10V +/-7%f or 250ms.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.ECU_FAULT_ACTION: Normal Operating Conditions begin to shut down. MS-CAN communication will work until voltage drops below 9 volts
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FAULT_SYMPTOM: ACM may shut down.

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.TEST_RUN_CRITERIA: If Monitoring Cycle requirements are met the check is performed.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: Continuous DTC: PASS: B+ is NOT greater than 16V +/-7% for greater than 250 msec. FAIL: B+ is greater than 16V +/-7% for greater than 5.5 seconds. On Demand Self Test: PASS: B+ is NOT greater than 16V +/-7% for greater than 250 msec. FAIL: B+ is greater than 16V +/-7% for greater than 5.5 seconds.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.ECU_FAULT_ACTION: Normal Operating conditions may begin to shut down
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FAULT_SYMPTOM: ACM may shut down.

ENUM_MEMBER.DESCRIPTION: Valid Application Software is NOT Present

ROUTINE.NAME: Active Noise Cancellation (ANC) Active Diagnostic Test
Clear Automobile Audio Bus (A2B) Error Network Counters
MBBM - Trigger Start of EOL Test
